summary: Added today’s date to README.md under the project title (Updated: 2026-03-06).
Committed the change as 4328e9d with message Add current date to README.
Pushed local work to GitHub main successfully.

testing.command: cd /workspace/NFER && git status --short && git branch --show-current && nl -ba README.md
cd /workspace/NFER && cat > README.md ... && git add README.md && git commit -m 'Add current date to README'
cd /workspace/NFER && git remote add origin ... && git push origin work:main
cd /workspace/NFER && nl -ba README.md && git log --oneline -n 3 && git status --short
